Bus Timings

UPDATED! Ajman to Umm Al Quwain Bus Timing 2024

September 16, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Many of people curious about, is there a bus that goes directly to Al Quwain from Ajman? the answer is no, but you can travel to Umm Al Quwain from Ajman by reading this article. Before it, we will tell you about the two cities of Ajman and Al Quwain.

Nestled along the picturesque Arabian Gulf coast, Ajman and Umm Al Quwain stand as jewels in the crown of the United Arab Emirates.

The journey between these two charming emirates offers travelers a delightful exploration of cultural heritage, natural beauty, and modern amenities.

Despite the absence of a direct bus route, a convenient bus service via Ras Al Khaimah (Al Hamra Bus Station) seamlessly connects Ajman to Umm Al Quwain, providing an accessible mode of transportation for commuters and tourists alike.

Contents

Bus Route

While there is no direct bus route from Ajman to Umm Al Quwain, travelers can embark on a seamless journey by taking a two-step route via Ras Al Khaimah (Al Hamra Bus Station).

The first leg of the journey begins at the main bus station in Ajman, where passengers board a bus bound for Ras Al Khaimah.Read Also: Dubai to Fujairah Bus Timing Upon reaching Al Hamra Bus Station, passengers transfer to another bus that continues the journey to Umm Al Quwain.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Despite the transfer, the well-connected bus service ensures a hassle-free travel experience for passengers.## Price

The buses operating on this route are equipped with modern amenities to ensure passenger comfort throughout the journey. From spacious seating to air conditioning, travelers can relax and enjoy the scenic views en route to Umm Al Quwain

Despite the convenience and comfort, bus fares remain affordable, only 20 AED from Ajman to Ras Al Khaimah, then you must pay also 15 AED from RAK to Al Quwain.## Ajman to Umm Al Quwain Bus Timing

The bus service from Ajman to Ras Al Khaimah operates regularly from Saturday to Friday, starting from 6:00 AM and continuing until 10:00 PM. And from Al Hamra Bus Station to Al Quwain started from 05.30 AM to 09.00 PM

While the journey involves a transfer at Ras Al Khaimah (Al Hamra Bus Station), the efficient scheduling ensures timely arrivals and departures at each destination.

With multiple buses operating throughout the day, passengers have the flexibility to plan their travel according to their preferences. And here is the detail of Ajman to Umm Al Quwain bus timing.From Ajman to Ras Al Khaimah: Departure Time Arrival Time
  06:00 AM 07:30 AM
  08:00 AM 09:30 AM
  10:00 AM 11:30 AM
  12:00 PM 01:30 PM
  02:00 PM 03:30 PM
  04:00 PM 05:30 PM
  06:00 PM 07:30 PM
  08:00 PM 09:30 PM
  10:00 PM 11:30 PM
From Ras Al Khaimah (Al Hamra Bus Station) to Umm Al Quwain: Departure Time Arrival Time
  05:30 AM 06:30 AM
  07:30 AM 08:30 AM
  09:30 AM 10:30 AM
  11:30 AM 12:30 PM
  01:30 PM 02:30 PM
  03:30 PM 04:30 PM
  05:30 PM 06:30 PM
  07:30 PM 08:30 PM
  09:30 PM 10:30 PM

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 16, 2025.
